title: Luoyang, Henan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Luoyang, Henan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Luoyang is a city in Henan with a population of 7,056,000. An ancient capital with over 1,500 years of history, famous for the Longmen Grottoes, White Horse Temple, and peony festivals.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
